svg.text: N O S Q L H U N T E R A R C H I T E C T U R E
Session Management · Concurrent Thread Pool · Response Analysis Engine · Timeline Logger · JSON Report Builder
Sources: PayloadsAllTheThings · HackTricks · PortSwigger · OWASP · CTFs
JSON Report · Color-Coded Console · Timeline · Severity Classification (Critical/High/Medium) · CVE-Style Remediation
Confidence Scoring · Raw Request/Response Capture · UUID Tracing · Chronological Event Log
MongoDB · CouchDB · Redis · Elasticsearch · DynamoDB · Firebase · Cassandra + 9 more
CLI parses args → Core Engine initializes session, thread pool, loads 6K+ payloads
Hellhound Spider discovers endpoints → Attack Modules test each with targeted payloads
Analyzer scores responses → Vulnerabilities logged with severity, confidence, and CVE-style remediation
Data extraction on vulnerable endpoints → JSON report with timeline, findings, and summary
